items.title: Tracing model calls
items.scenario: An LLM service logs model name, latency and token usage for every request to debug slow or expensive calls.
items.explanation: An INFO log per call gives an audit trail; structured fields make it searchable in a log aggregator.

items.title: Silencing a chatty SDK
items.scenario: An HTTP client library floods the console with DEBUG output during development.
items.explanation: logging.getLogger('httpx').setLevel(logging.WARNING) keeps your own logs readable without touching the library.

items.title: Dev vs prod verbosity
items.scenario: You want DEBUG detail locally but only WARNING and above in production.
items.explanation: Set the level from an environment variable at startup so the same code runs quietly in prod.

items.title: Recording retries
items.scenario: A call to the model fails twice then succeeds after backoff.
items.explanation: log.warning on each retry, log.error if all retries fail, gives visibility into transient failures.
